This 23-inch DBH sweetgum tree is completely dead and qualifies as a DDH (Dead, Dying, and Hazardous) tree. Approximately 30% of the upper canopy has already failed and fallen into lower utility lines, demonstrating active structural failure and advanced deterioration.
